title: Ultra-Detailed Luxury Travel Scrapbook Collage
sourceTitle: Luxury Travel Scrapbook Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed luxury travel scrapbook collage titled UAE Summer 2026 - Postcard from the UAE for United Arab Emirates, built as an elegant editorial magazine mood board. Subject: Two large overlapping Polaroid-style portraits feature glamorous blonde adult travel muse in a sleeveless high-neck chocolate-brown satin dress with silver ring waist detail, matching structured leather handbag, and gold: one balcony portrait overlooking the Dubai skyline and Burj Khalifa, and one marble-balustrade portrait with Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque behind her. Scene: The scrapbook surrounds the portraits with Burj Khalifa, Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Burj Al Arab, Dubai Frame, Dubai Marina, Museum of the Future, Louvre Abu Dhabi, Palm Jumeirah, Old Dubai, Dubai Mall, luxury, passport stamps, premium boarding pass, postage stamp, parchment note, UAE map silhouette, oud perfume bottle, dates, porcelain coffee cup, palm shadows, and gold Islamic geometric patterns. Composition: Fixed upscale scrapbook layout with two dominant overlapping Polaroids in the center, curated travel photos around them, clipped parchment note, refined ephemera, layered paper textures, realistic shadows, and impeccable editorial balance. Signature Elements: Overlapping Polaroids, Dubai and Abu Dhabi landmarks, travel ephemera, passport stamps, boarding pass, faux postage, gold UAE map, oud perfume, dates, coffee cup, Islamic geometry, palm shadows, and luxury paper layering. Style: Elegant luxury travel editorial, high-end fashion magazine scrapbook, photorealistic travel photography, layered paper collage, premium lifestyle campaign quality, cinematic lighting, and sophisticated UAE destination mood board. Color Palette: Fixed warm cream, beige, ivory, gold, camel, rich chocolate brown, soft marble white, desert sand, and subtle skyline blues. Lighting: Soft sunlight, golden travel glow, realistic paper and Polaroid shadows, gentle luxury highlights, and cinematic depth across the layered scrapbook surface. Typography: UAE Summer 2026 - Postcard from the UAE appears as the premium editorial title; United Arab Emirates appears on the first-class boarding pass; Elegant days in the Emirates. City lights, desert dreams. Luxury, culture, and golden sunsets. appears as elegant handwritten text on a textured parchment note. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
